choices.name: Launch_Type_Community_Group
choices.choiceText: A community group or church I'm part of

fields.name: Disclaimer
fields.fieldText:
Welcome, neighbour.


FIMBY is a small, practical way to share life with the people on your street — to ask for help, offer what you have, borrow a drill, split a Costco run, or just learn a few names.


We’ll start with a few basics: your name, address, and a way for us to reach you. If your postal code is in a FIMBY neighbourhood, you’ll be in. If we’re not there yet, we’ll add you to the waitlist and let you know when we arrive.


Click Next to get started.

fields.name: ChristianDIsclaimer
fields.fieldText: FIMBY is rooted in a Christian vision of love and community, but practiced in everyday, neighbour-level ways.

fields.name: PersonalDetails
fields.fieldText: Personal Information

fields.name: First_Name
fields.fieldText: First Name

validationRule.errorMessage: Your First Name can be a maximum of 40 characers

fields.name: Last_Name
fields.fieldText: Last Name

validationRule.errorMessage: Your Last Name can be a maximum of 120 characers

fields.name: Mailing_Street
fields.fieldText: Mailing Street

fields.name: City
fields.fieldText: City

fields.name: Province_State
fields.fieldText: Province (State)

fields.name: Postal_COde
fields.fieldText: Postal Code

fields.name: Household_Nickname_Username
fields.fieldText: Household Name (e.g. Smith Household)

fields.name: privacydisclaimer
fields.fieldText: {!Privacy}

fields.name: Age_Attestation
fields.fieldText: I'm 19 or older and able to agree to the FIMBY Terms.

fields.name: Not_In_Neighbourhood_Display
fields.fieldText:
We're not yet in your neighbourhood.


Thank you for your interest. We'll add you to our waitlist and let you know when FIMBY launches in your area.


If you're part of a community group, church, or neighbourhood network that would like to help launch FIMBY in your area, let us know below.

fields.name: Want_To_Help_Launch
fields.fieldText: I'd like to help bring FIMBY to my neighbourhood.

fields.name: Launch_Lead_Intro
fields.fieldText:
Tell us a little more

A few quick questions so we can follow up about launching FIMBY in your area.

fields.name: Launch_Lead_Type
fields.fieldText: What kind of launch?

fields.name: Community_Group_Connection
fields.fieldText: If you're part of a community group or church, what is its name?

fields.name: Estimated_Launch_Cohort_Size
fields.fieldText: How many people could you launch with?

fields.name: Best_Contact_Method
fields.fieldText: Best way to reach you?

fields.name: Launch_Notes
fields.fieldText: Anything else you'd like us to know?

fields.name: Waitlist_Thank_You_Display
fields.fieldText:
You're on the waitlist.

Thanks for letting us know. We'll be in touch when FIMBY arrives in your neighbourhood.

fields.name: Launch_Thank_You_Display
fields.fieldText:
Thank you.

Helping launch a new FIMBY neighbourhood takes a small spark of leadership. We'll be in touch soon with what comes next.

fields.name: ThankyouConfirmation
fields.fieldText:
You’re all set.

We’ve received your sign-up, and you’ll hear from us shortly with what comes next.

textTemplates.name: Privacy
textTemplates.text:
🔒 Your privacy matters. Only your name is visible to neighbours. You control who can see your contact details (person by person).
FIMBY is for adults 19 or older. By signing up you confirm you have read FIMBY's Terms of Service and Privacy Policy. You'll be asked to formally accept the Terms the first time you log in.
